input.format: Raw HTML, raw Markdown, or 01_LOSSLESS canonical text. UTF-8.

output.format: JSON section ledger with stable section_ids, heading_path list, source anchors, equation/citation counts, and pass markers stub. Per-section markdown packets for downstream consumption.

loopback_conditions: More than 10% of sections are inferred (no explicit heading) and adjacent boundaries are not detectable from structural cues
Heading hierarchy is structurally broken (e.g. h3 appears before any h2 with no <section> container to absorb it) and cannot be resolved deterministically
Same heading text repeats at the same level with no disambiguating ancestor, producing duplicate section_id candidates
Equation count differs from raw $...$ pair count by more than 2 (suggests math is split across sections wrongly; 07_MATH_TRANSLATION will not be able to reattach)
section_id_rules: Ordinal is global (1..N) across the document in source order
If heading is inferred (no explicit h-tag), slug derives from the first 5 non-stopword tokens of the section text and inferred=true

pass_markers_emitted.other_section_passes: left as {'status': 'pending'} for downstream lanes to fill (claims, vectors, math_translation, rigor)

alignment_notes: Aligned to ARTICLE_OUTPUT_REGISTRY Section Structure family (section-map.json, section-map.md, section-packets/).
heading_path matches schemas.MarkdownBlock.heading_path semantics so block-level consumers can join cleanly.

DOES NOT emit semantic_address / vector / hash. Per SWARM_WORK_ORDER_ROUND1 + CALIBRATION_EXPECTED, those belong to 04_TAGS. Drift between this and lane_registry.json v2 (which moved PDS into 02) is flagged in workflow-4 status; awaiting Opus reconciliation.
